mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.courseId, c.episodeId, c.userId, u.nickname, u.avatarUrl, c.parentId, c.rootId, parentUser.nickname AS replyToNickname, c.content, c.likeCount, CASE WHEN commentLike.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS liked, CASE WHEN c.rootId = 0 THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_comment reply WHERE reply.rootId = c.id AND reply.status = 1 AND reply.deleted = 0 ) ELSE 0 END AS replyCount, c.status, c.createTime FROM course_comment c LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = c.userId LEFT JOIN course_comment parentComment ON parentComment.id = c.parentId AND parentComment.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `user` parentUser ON parentUser.id = parentComment.userId LEFT JOIN course_comment_like commentLike ON commentLike.commentId = c.id AND commentLike.userId = #{userId} AND commentLike.status = 1 AND commentLike.deleted = 0 WHERE c.courseId = #{query.courseId} AND c.episodeId = #{query.episodeId} AND c.rootId = #{query.rootId} AND c.status = 1 AND c.deleted = 0
ORDER BY c.createTime DESC
ORDER BY c.createTime ASC
